intro.zh: 记录我正在学的几门课、写下来的笔记，还有偶尔做饭的心得。选一个分区开始。
intro.en: Notes from courses I'm taking, things I've written down, and occasional cooking experiments. Pick a section to start.

tagline.zh: 从零实现一个语言模型
tagline.en: Build a language model from scratch

description.zh: 跟着 CS336 / DIY LLM 一步步搭起来的笔记，从分词器、优化器到训练流水线。
description.en: Step-by-step notes following CS336 / DIY LLM, from tokenizers and optimizers to the training pipeline.

description.zh: 围绕单体智能体的感知、工具使用、记忆、规划等能力建立系统认知。
description.en: Building a systematic understanding of single-agent capabilities: perception, tool use, memory, and planning.

tagline.zh: 多 Agent 设计与工程化

description.zh: 多 Agent 协同、通信协议、角色分工、落地时的工程权衡。
description.en: Multi-agent collaboration, communication protocols, role assignment, and engineering trade-offs in production.

description.zh: 偶尔记录做过的菜、学到的手法，和一些失败也值得分享的翻车现场。
description.en: Occasional notes on dishes I've made, techniques I've picked up, and kitchen disasters worth sharing.

description.zh: 读源码、拆项目时随手记下的问题和理解，不求体系，只求想清楚。
description.en: Questions and thoughts jotted down while reading source code and dissecting projects. No system — just clarity.

tagline.zh: 从架构概念到工程直觉
tagline.en: From architecture concepts to engineering intuition

description.zh: 从单机到分布式系统的完整进阶路线，涵盖扩容、估算、面试框架、限流、一致性哈希、KV Store、短链、爬虫、通知、信息流、聊天、搜索、视频、云盘等 16 个章节。
description.en: Complete system design course from single server to distributed systems.

title.zh: 第一节课｜从零构建语言模型
title.en: Lesson 1 | Building a Language Model from Scratch

description.zh: 课程哲学、分词、模型架构、Scaling Laws 与对齐的第一轮总览。
description.en: A first overview of course philosophy, tokenization, model architecture, scaling laws, and alignment.

description.zh: 围绕 tokenizer、BPE、数据预处理和系统成本整理的章节笔记。
description.en: Chapter notes on tokenizers, BPE, data preprocessing, and system-level costs.

title.zh: 第二节课｜PyTorch 与优化器

description.zh: 张量视图、stride、einsum、反向传播和常用优化器的可视化笔记。
description.en: Visual notes on tensor views, stride, einsum, backpropagation, and common optimizers.

title.zh: Chapter 4｜语言模型架构和训练细节
title.en: Chapter 4 | Language Model Architecture and Training Details

description.zh: 位置编码、Transformer 数据流、注意力细节、归一化、GLU 与 RoPE。
description.en: Positional encoding, Transformer data flow, attention details, normalization, GLU, and RoPE.

title.zh: LLM 应用的三层能力｜从纯对话到 RAG
title.en: Three Layers of LLM Apps | From Chat to RAG

description.zh: 纯对话、Tool Calling 和 RAG 各自在做什么，怎么实现，直接 SDK 和 LangChain 怎么选。
description.en: What plain chat, tool calling, and RAG each do, how they work, and when to use raw SDK vs LangChain.

description.zh: 前言相关笔记。
description.en: Notes on 前言.

title.zh: 扩容路径｜从零到百万用户
title.en: 扩容路径｜从零到百万用户
